creator: flo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Franz Schwartau from comment #3)
Yes, that's the correct solution. The port does not have a hard dep on mysqlXX-client it uses mysql.mk and that does the correct thing. 
If you want to use MariaDB as the default, you cannot use the FreeBSD provided packages, as they still build with MySQL as default. 

There was talk about changing it, but that went nowhere AFAIK. That will also create the same situation for people relying on mysqlXX-server ports.

You will have to build your own package set. Nothing that can be done in the icinga2 port to fix this situation.
